case_title: BETTY NDAYA MUIMPE VS. MICHAEL ORLANDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BETTY NDAYA MUIMPE PURSUANT TO SECTION 377.32 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIMPE, BETTY NDAYA INDIVIDUALLY, AND AS HEIR AND SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DAUDET MUKENDI MUIMPE, DECEASED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-12-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-08-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIMPE, BETTY NDAYA INDIVIDUALLY, AND AS HEIR AND SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DAUDET MUKENDI MUIMPE, DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, MICHAEL CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO FIRE DEPARTMENT DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-27-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-05-2017
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17334021)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-27-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
